packages.name: @ismail-elkorchi/textfacts
packages.scope: Deterministic single-text kernel. Legacy public pack/protocol/schema helpers are frozen; new cross-package growth does not land here.
limitations: New cross-package protocol/resource growth is frozen outside textfacts
Locale tailoring breadth remains limited

packages.name: @ismail-elkorchi/textdoc
packages.scope: Document containers, lifecycle, provenance, and annotation-layer validation are implemented.
limitations: No dependency tree, coreference chain, or relation graph conventions are production-grade yet
Package remains private until broader release gates pass

packages.name: @ismail-elkorchi/textpack
packages.scope: Manifest validation, licensed fixture resources, overlay precedence, and conflict diagnostics are implemented.
limitations: No broad multilingual resource marketplace or vetting workflow is implemented
Package remains private until broader release gates pass

packages.name: @ismail-elkorchi/textrules
packages.scope: Rule-backed POS, lemma, morphology, and NER behavior is implemented only for the frozen issue #10 and #13 slices.
limitations: Behavior is limited to curated fixtures and small hand-authored resources
Package remains private until broader release gates pass

packages.name: @ismail-elkorchi/textpipeline
packages.scope: The synchronous deterministic processor contract and execution trace are implemented; async, streaming, batching, and caching are still absent.
limitations: No async, streaming, batching, cache, or distributed execution
Package remains private until broader release gates pass

packages.name: @ismail-elkorchi/textcorpus
packages.scope: Explicit-token corpus collections, metadata slicing, deterministic fingerprint indexing, and frozen-scope TF-IDF/BM25 scoring are implemented.
limitations: No full IR index, query language, ranking evaluation, snippets, or large corpora
Package remains private until broader release gates pass

packages.name: @ismail-elkorchi/textprotocol
packages.scope: Result-envelope types, runtime guards, and repository schema are implemented.
limitations: No version-negotiation or transport protocol is standardized
Package remains private until broader release gates pass

packages.name: @ismail-elkorchi/textconformance
packages.scope: Machine-readable conformance reports and runtime guards are implemented.
limitations: Runner behavior is minimal and not a full benchmark harness yet
Package remains private until broader release gates pass

packages.name: @ismail-elkorchi/textlab
packages.scope: Only the workspace scaffold exists; no public inspection-command behavior is implemented yet.
limitations: No public CLI or inspection behavior exists
Package remains private until broader release gates pass

tasks.scope: Frozen fixtures, expected outputs, comparator captures, and executable behavior are present for the current slices.
limitations: Not a broad multilingual tokenizer benchmark suite

tasks.scope: The document model, invalid-reference policy, lifecycle/provenance support, and round-trip validation are implemented.
limitations: No full syntactic dependency/coreference/relation graph standard yet

tasks.scope: Resource-manifest validation, licensed fixtures, and overlay-conflict policy are implemented.
limitations: No public resource review workflow or registry is implemented

tasks.scope: Deterministic POS, lemma, and morphology outputs exist only for the frozen issue #10 slices.
limitations: Not a trained or broad multilingual tagger; fixture-bound deterministic behavior only

tasks.scope: Deterministic rule-backed PER/ORG/LOC outputs exist only for the frozen issue #13 slices, with recorded expected outputs and comparator captures.
limitations: Only PER/ORG/LOC and small curated resources are covered

tasks.scope: Deterministic raw TF, smooth TF-IDF, and Okapi BM25 outputs exist only for the frozen issue #14 explicit-token corpus.
limitations: No full retrieval engine, query parser, snippets, or relevance benchmark
